step_by_step_thinking:
Considering the roles of different amino acids, leucine stands out uniquely because not only does it undergo ketone body production through ketoacid pathway, which makes it ketogenic; its side chains have characteristics that allow them to be metabolized back into glucose if necessary, aligning with potential gluconeogenic capabilities. This dual functionality distinguishes leucine from isoleucine, arginine, and glycine based on their respective biochemical properties and metabolic fates during catabolism.

Answer Choice: B. Agreed.
